creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191561
Patch upating x11/dmenu to 4.8

4.8 changelog: 
 - https://git.suckless.org/dmenu/log/?qt=range&q=4.7..4.8

Changes in the attached patch:
 - Remove PATCH_SITES.
 - Move FREETYPEINC to MAKE_ARGS from patches. This way the patch for config.mk is smaller.
 - Improve pkg-descr.

Also, there were some maintainer timeouts before. Because of this I am eager to take over the maintainership of this port if the current maintainer wish to step down. :)
